  • Uses of HttpServerBuilder in io.vertx.mutiny.core

    Methods in io.vertx.mutiny.core that return HttpServerBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpServerBuilder
    Vertx.httpServerBuilder()
    Provide a builder for HttpServer, it can be used to configure advanced HTTP servre settings like a connection handler.
